sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111595" key="filo/xrhsmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-χρησμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of oracles,</tr_> cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
